tags.description:en: Flower Meadow on Phu Wat, an area with a rocky plateau sprinkled with wildflowers; such as, Melastoma saigonense (Kuntze) Merr., Eriocaulon henryanum Ruhle, and Utricularia delphinioides Thorelex Pellegr. blooming in the late rainy season and early winter
tags.name: ภูวัด

tags.description:en: Phu Sa Dok Bua, a mountain about 423 metres high with 11 natural rock pools on its summit, filled with water year-round and blooming with small, white to pink lotus flowers. Local lore suggests these lotuses have naturally existed for a long time, giving
tags.name: ภูสระดอกบัว
